corrections.note: Printed text has dative ἑαυτῇ, not genitive ἑαυτῆς.
Apparatus includes siglum A after ℵ.
Parenthetical abbreviation is printed with accent; rest of sigla sequence appears correct.

notes: Running head matches. Body is otherwise accurate, including line-number/verse-number layout and hyphenation. Apparatus mostly correct; one omitted siglum in line 9 and one minor accent in parenthetical abbreviation on line 16.
